records.ety: [LL. affidavit he has made oath, perfect tense of affidare. See Affiance, Affy.]

defs: A sworn statement in writing; a declaration in writing, signed and made upon oath before an authorized magistrate.
notes: ☞ It is always made ex parte, and without cross-examination, and in this differs from a deposition. It is also applied to written statements made on affirmation.
